rationale: DELIBERATELY-CORRUPTED KG entry (the negative test): the KG node asserts an auditTrailLink (a traceable source) BUT the source-of-record reference is a DANGLING path that does not exist on disk. The probe EXECUTES the resolve+read: source-traceability FAILs (os.path.exists False), and field-match detects a source_existence MISMATCH (KG claims a traceable source that reality lacks). A naive flag-checker trusting source_present:true would WRONGLY count this faithful; the correctly-calibrated Class E probe catches it => fidelity_ok=False, disposition=infidelity_or_unverified. This is the KT-12 / anti-substitution firing-surface negative test.
